# Super Evolution Core Fusion Note

Status: preserved source material for APEX/Pgg RuntimeOS.

Source path on Apple local machine:
`/Users/appleoppa/Desktop/超级进化核心`

Purpose:
- Preserve the full desktop Super Evolution core source set.
- Keep CodeGenesis, EVM, GeneNexus, LLM-Pangu, XuanjiQuant, apex-spiral, and evolver source material together.
- Provide source material for later RuntimeOS module extraction.

Boundary:
- This directory is source preservation, not live RuntimeOS execution.
- Do not flatten these projects into Hermes core without review and tests.
- Do not treat runtime memory/state files as verified current capability.
- EVM here means APEX evolution defect gate, not blockchain EVM optional skill.
